svg.title: edens.zac collection content map
svg.desc: Map of the real published collections and how a visitor navigates between them.
svg.text: Live collections as published today (2026-06-29) · how visitors move collection → collection
MEMBERSHIP DOTS — one collection, several parents
Pill = a collection (slug shown) · right tag = type
CLIENT GALLERIES — guests unlock with a per-collection password; logged-in members see their own. Entry: /all-client-galleries (14)
Sees every public collection above. Client galleries need the
Public browse PLUS a “Me” tile on Home → /user (your galleries +
Local-only editing tools. Not part of the visitor flow.

Data notes: children’s reverse “parents” field is empty (no breadcrumb data) · most “(film)” collections sit under Film + Travel, but vienna-film / seattle-on-film / gorge-50km-film are parented inconsistently · only 2 “Related” links exist across 24 collections.
